figures.figure_family_label: Mindoro March 13 -> March 14 primary validation package
figures.short_plain_language_interpretation: This is now the main Mindoro presentation board because it centers the promoted March 13 -> March 14 validation pair and the best OpenDrift result while keeping the shared-imagery caveat explicit.
figures.notes: Board assembled from publication-grade March 13 -> March 14 singles rebuilt from stored rasters and vectors only.
figures.status_label: Mindoro March 13 -> March 14 NOAA reinit primary validation
figures.status_provenance: March 13 seed, March 14 target, and explicit shared March 12 imagery caveat.
figures.status_panel_text: Use this as the main Mindoro validation view, but state clearly that both NOAA products cite March 12 imagery.
figures.status_dashboard_summary: Promoted primary validation; inherited-provisional; not frozen.

figures.figure_family_label: Mindoro March 13 -> March 14 cross-model publication package
figures.short_plain_language_interpretation: This board answers the cross-model question on the promoted March 14 target without treating PyGNOME as truth and without upgrading the shared-imagery pair into an independent day-to-day validation claim.
figures.notes: Board assembled from publication-grade March 13 -> March 14 singles rebuilt from stored rasters only; PyGNOME remains comparator-only.
figures.status_provenance: Same March 14 target as the promoted primary row; PyGNOME remains comparator-only.
figures.status_panel_text: Use this only for side-by-side comparison on the promoted March 14 target; PyGNOME is a comparator, not truth.
figures.status_dashboard_summary: Comparator-only lane on the promoted March 14 target.

figures.figure_family_label: Mindoro legacy March 6 honesty / limitations package

figures.status_label: Mindoro legacy March 6 sparse strict reference
figures.status_provenance: Sparse March 6 reference retained for methods honesty.
figures.status_panel_text: Keep this visible for honesty and limitations, but do not label it as the primary, official, or frozen Mindoro result.

figures.figure_family_label: DWH deterministic publication package

figures.status_panel_text: Use this as the main DWH transfer-validation view; it supports the external-case success story but does not replace the Mindoro main case.

figures.figure_family_label: DWH deterministic vs ensemble publication package

figures.status_panel_text: Use this to explain deterministic, p50, and p90 differences without overstating ensemble benefit as universal.

figures.figure_family_label: DWH OpenDrift vs PyGNOME publication package
